fixes.title: Add IAM roles for least privilege
fixes.risk_reduction: Reduces risk of overprivileged execution; supports NIST AC-6
fixes.evidence_required_to_close: iam.tf with role and policy; no wildcard actions

fixes.title: Add cost allocation tags
fixes.risk_reduction: Enables cost allocation; supports Cost Optimization pillar
fixes.evidence_required_to_close: Tags: Environment, Project, CostCenter on all resources

fixes.title: Add SAST to CI pipeline
fixes.risk_reduction: Catches security issues before merge; supports supply chain security
fixes.evidence_required_to_close: CI job runs SAST (e.g. semgrep, trivy) on code
fixes.patch_content:
- name: SAST
  run: semgrep scan --config auto
